title: Cilit Bang Power Cleaner Universal Burnt on Degreaser | Removes Food Stains, Dirt and Grease (750ml)
features: Powerful Degreasing Formula: Tackles tough, burnt-on grease and food stains with ease for a sparkling clean finish.
Multipurpose Cleaner: Ideal for kitchen surfaces, ovens, stovetops, grills, and more – effective on a wide range of household messes.
Fast-Acting Performance: Works quickly to dissolve dirt and grime, reducing the need for scrubbing and saving time.
Easy to Use: Simply spray on, leave for a few minutes, and wipe clean – no harsh scrubbing required.
Trusted Brand: From the makers of Cillit Bang – known for powerful cleaning performance and reliable results.
description: Product Description Cillit Bang Power Cleaner Universal Burnt-on Degreaser (750ml) is your go-to solution for removing tough, baked-on grease, stubborn food stains, and everyday dirt across your kitchen surfaces. Formulated with a fast-acting, heavy-duty degreasing agent, it penetrates and lifts grime without the need for scrubbing. Whether you're tackling ovens, hobs, grills, or countertops, this multipurpose spray delivers outstanding results every time. Easy to apply and wipe away, it leaves surfaces hygienically clean and refreshed with minimal effort. Trust Cillit Bang for powerful cleaning when it matters most. Ingredients Ingredients: www.rbeuroinfo.com Per 100g of product contains 0.11g alkyl (C12-16) dimethylbenzyl ammonium chloride (ADBAC) (68424-85-1). Contains <5% Non-Ionic surfactants, Disinfectants, Perfumes (limonene)
